creator: uwe@laverenz.de
text:
Hi,

adding Option "CPPIOMode" "yes" fixes the garbled screen but it also 
disables direct rendering. So hardware 3d acceleration can not be used 
with the t43p. I did some testing with a fresh RELENG_7, with and 
without the latest drm-patches from Robert Noland:

http://people.freebsd.org/~rnoland/drm-update-7-100308.patch.bz2

Uwe
